home.title: Play and win in TON
home.subtitle: PvP wheel, battleship, Mines and Plinko. Fair games with verifiable outcomes.

games.wheelDesc: PvP wheel: the bigger your bet, the higher your chance to take the pot
games.battleshipDesc: Classic PvP for a stake — sink your opponent's fleet
games.tictactoeDesc: Quick PvP match, winner takes the pot
games.minesDesc: Reveal tiles, dodge the mines and cash out in time
games.plinkoDesc: Drop the ball and watch which multiplier it lands on
games.online: PvP games with stakes against real players
games.solo: Games against the house with provable fairness
